title: Hunting: Credential Attack Correlation (PowerShell + Mimikatz + Kerberoast)
description: Correlates credential attack indicators across Windows Security Events. Identifies hosts/entities showing multiple attack stages: PowerShell download cradles, Mimikatz execution, and Kerberoasting activity within the same time window.
query: 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' and (('Event ID' = '4688' and ('Original Log Content' like '%powershell%' and ('Original Log Content' like '%DownloadString%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%-enc %' or 'Original Log Content' like '%Invoke-Mimikatz%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%Invoke-Kerberoast%'))) or ('Event ID' = '4688' and ('Original Log Content' like '%sekurlsa::%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%lsadump::%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%mimikatz%')) or ('Event ID' = '4769' and 'Original Log Content' like '%0x17%')) | eval AttackType = case('Original Log Content' like '%sekurlsa%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%mimikatz%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%lsadump%', 'Mimikatz', 'Original Log Content' like '%0x17%', 'Kerberoasting', 'Original Log Content' like '%powershell%', 'PowerShell_Attack', 'Other') | stats count as TotalEvents, distinctcount(AttackType) as AttackTypes by Entity | where AttackTypes >= 2 | sort -TotalEvents
